data.global_open_message: Message when a monitored sensor opens
data.global_reminder_message: Reminder message while a monitored sensor stays open

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Home Sensor Notifications configuration is allowed.

init.title: Home Sensor Notifications

data.global_open_message: Message when a monitored sensor opens
data.global_reminder_message: Reminder message while a monitored sensor stays open

send_test_notification.name: Send test notification
send_test_notification.description: Sends a test notification to the configured or supplied targets.

sensor.name: Sensor
sensor.description: Optional sensor entity to include in the test message.

targets.name: Targets
targets.description: Optional override list of notify service names to send to.

delivery_mode.name: Delivery mode
delivery_mode.description: Optional override for normal, critical, or both delivery.

sound_enabled.name: Enable sound
sound_enabled.description: Optional override to force sound on or off for the test.

sound_name.name: Sound name
sound_name.description: Optional override sound name to use for the test.
